# Phase 3 — Sitemap walkthrough (AURUM Steward Workbench)

**Auto-generated by `scripts/generate_sitemap.py`. Do NOT hand-edit — edit the SITEMAP definition in the script and re-run.**

Step-by-step build of the AURUM Steward Workbench model-driven app sitemap, manually in the Power Apps maker UI's modern app designer. Total estimated time: **20–25 minutes** (1 area + 5 groups + 9 subareas + emoji-render verification).

## Pre-flight (before opening maker UI)

1. Confirm the 5 tables exist in env via `python scripts/verify_env_columns.py` (re-runs in ~3 sec, sanity-check). Manifest in `docs/env_column_manifest_<DATE>.md`.
2. The 5 system views referenced from sitemap subareas (Pending Steward Review × 3, Active Profile Findings, Active Golden Records) do NOT need to exist before sitemap build — entity-type SubAreas land on the entity's *current default view*, then steward picks from view dropdown. Views are built per `phase3_views_specification.md` either before or after sitemap (independent work).
3. Have your Dataverse env open: maker.powerapps.com → AURUM-PP-Dev environment → Solutions → AURUM Master Data Management.

## Step 1 — Create the model-driven app shell (3 min)

1. Solutions → AURUM Master Data Management → **+ New** → **App** → **Model-driven app**.
2. Name: **AURUM Steward Workbench**. Description: "AURUM 5-stage pipeline UI — ASSAY profiling, UNEARTH staging, REFINE matching, UNFURL canonical, plus dashboards. MARK stage absent until Phase 4."
3. Click **Create**. Modern app designer opens.

📸 **Screenshot to capture:** the empty modern app designer with the app name in the title bar.

## Step 2 — Build the sitemap (15 min)

In the modern app designer, the left **Pages** pane is your sitemap. The user's design has 1 area ("AURUM Steward Workbench") containing 5 groups, totaling 9 subareas. Build them in the order below.

> **Emoji-rendering check** — the modern app designer accepts emoji in titles, but rendering varies by browser/OS at runtime. After completing the sitemap, **Play** the app and verify emoji render correctly. If they don't, edit each Group title back to its plain-text version per the `Plain-text fallback` column.

### Build order

| # | Parent | Action | Title (with icon) | Plain-text fallback | Type | Target | Time |
|---:|---|---|---|---|---|---|---:|
| 1 | (root) | Add Area | `AURUM Steward Workbench` | `AURUM Steward Workbench` | Area | (n/a) | 1 min |
| 2 | `AURUM Steward Workbench` | Add Group | `📥 ASSAY (Profiling)` | `ASSAY (Profiling)` | Group | (n/a) | 1 min |
| 3 | `📥 ASSAY (Profiling)` | Add SubArea | `Data Quality Findings` | `Data Quality Findings` | Entity | Entity: `aurum_assay_profile` | 1 min |
| 4 | `AURUM Steward Workbench` | Add Group | `🔍 UNEARTH (Staging)` | `UNEARTH (Staging)` | Group | (n/a) | 1 min |
| 5 | `🔍 UNEARTH (Staging)` | Add SubArea | `CRM Records` | `CRM Records` | Entity | Entity: `aurum_crm_customer` | 1 min |
| 6 | `🔍 UNEARTH (Staging)` | Add SubArea | `E-commerce Records` | `E-commerce Records` | Entity | Entity: `aurum_ecomm_customer` | 1 min |
| 7 | `🔍 UNEARTH (Staging)` | Add SubArea | `Loyalty Records` | `Loyalty Records` | Entity | Entity: `aurum_loyalty_customer` | 1 min |
| 8 | `AURUM Steward Workbench` | Add Group | `⚖️ REFINE (Matching)` | `REFINE (Matching)` | Group | (n/a) | 1 min |
| 9 | `⚖️ REFINE (Matching)` | Add SubArea | `Pending Steward Review` | `Pending Steward Review` | Entity | Entity: `aurum_crm_customer` | 1 min |
| 10 | `⚖️ REFINE (Matching)` | Add SubArea | `Auto-Approved Matches` | `Auto-Approved Matches` | Entity | Entity: `aurum_crm_customer` | 1 min |
| 11 | `⚖️ REFINE (Matching)` | Add SubArea | `Unmatched Records` | `Unmatched Records` | Entity | Entity: `aurum_crm_customer` | 1 min |
| 12 | `AURUM Steward Workbench` | Add Group | `🌟 UNFURL (Canonical)` | `UNFURL (Canonical)` | Group | (n/a) | 1 min |
| 13 | `🌟 UNFURL (Canonical)` | Add SubArea | `Customer Master` | `Customer Master` | Entity | Entity: `aurum_customer` | 1 min |
| 14 | `AURUM Steward Workbench` | Add Group | `📊 Dashboards` | `Dashboards` | Group | (n/a) | 1 min |
| 15 | `📊 Dashboards` | Add SubArea | `AURUM-PP Operations Dashboard` | `AURUM-PP Operations Dashboard` | Dashboard | Dashboard: (TBD) | 1 min |

### Per-group context (use this when prompting the maker designer for descriptions)

#### 📥 ASSAY (Profiling)

- **AURUM stage:** ASSAY
- **Description:** Data quality findings + column-level profiling statistics. Surfaces nulls, format anomalies, and sample values per source field.

  - **Data Quality Findings** — Entity (`aurum_assay_profile`)
    - *Note:* Default view: 'Active Profile Findings' (create per views_specification.md, then mark as default in entity's Public Views).

#### 🔍 UNEARTH (Staging)

- **AURUM stage:** UNEARTH
- **Description:** Raw staging records as-ingested per source system. Pre-normalization, pre-matching.

  - **CRM Records** — Entity (`aurum_crm_customer`)
  - **E-commerce Records** — Entity (`aurum_ecomm_customer`)
  - **Loyalty Records** — Entity (`aurum_loyalty_customer`)

#### ⚖️ REFINE (Matching)

- **AURUM stage:** REFINE
- **Description:** Match outcomes — borderline, auto-approved, unmatched. Cross-table virtual views are NOT a native model-driven app concept (acknowledged Phase 7 hero-page work); each subarea points to one staging table by default.

  - **Pending Steward Review** — Entity (`aurum_crm_customer`)
    - *Note:* Cross-table limitation — points to CRM by default. Create 'Pending Steward Review' view on all 3 staging tables (filter: aurum_processing_status = 4 / STEWARD_REVIEW). Steward navigates between sources via left-nav after selecting this entry. Phase 7 hero-page work will replace this with a unified canvas-app page.
  - **Auto-Approved Matches** — Entity (`aurum_crm_customer`)
    - *Note:* Cross-table limitation — same as above. View filter: aurum_processing_status = 5 / SURVIVED AND aurum_match_method ∈ {EXACT, FUZZY_HIGH}.
  - **Unmatched Records** — Entity (`aurum_crm_customer`)
    - *Note:* Cross-table limitation — same as above. View filter: aurum_match_method = 5 / UNMATCHED OR aurum_canonical_customer = null.

#### 🌟 UNFURL (Canonical)

- **AURUM stage:** UNFURL
- **Description:** Canonical / golden customer records — the survivorship-resolved single view. Surfaces trust score, completeness, source provenance.

  - **Customer Master** — Entity (`aurum_customer`)
    - *Note:* Default view: 'Active Golden Records' (filter: aurum_is_golden = true; create per views_specification.md, mark as default in entity's Public Views).

#### 📊 Dashboards

- **AURUM stage:** (none)
- **Description:** Operational dashboard surfaces. MARK stage intentionally absent — no lineage table exists yet (Power Automate audit trail comes Phase 4). Adding an empty MARK node now would look broken.

  - **AURUM-PP Operations Dashboard** — Dashboard
    - *Note:* Dashboard does not exist yet at sitemap-build time. Two options at execution: (a) create a placeholder system dashboard first then bind this SubArea to it, OR (b) skip this SubArea until Phase 6's dashboard work and add it then. Option (b) recommended — empty dashboards look worse than a missing nav entry.

## Step 3 — Save and Play (2 min)

1. Click **Save** (top-right). Wait for save confirmation.
2. Click **Play**. App opens in a new tab.
3. Verify all 5 groups render in left nav, all 9 subareas are clickable, navigation between groups works.
4. **Emoji-rendering check** — confirm `📥 🔍 ⚖️ 🌟 📊` render correctly. If broken/missing/garbled, return to designer, edit each Group title back to its plain-text fallback.

📸 **Screenshot to capture:** the live app's left navigation pane showing all 5 stage groups (with whichever icon style ended up rendering).

## Step 4 — Publish (1 min)

1. Back in app designer, click **Publish**. Wait for confirmation.
2. Share the app: top-right **Share** → assign **System Customizer** + your user. Phase 4 will add proper steward security roles.

## Known limitations (acknowledge upfront)

1. **Cross-table views** — REFINE's three subareas (Pending Steward Review, Auto-Approved Matches, Unmatched Records) each point to ONE table (`aurum_crm_customer` by default). Steward navigates between CRM/ECOMM/LOYALTY via left-nav after selecting the REFINE entry. NOT IDEAL but acceptable for Phase 3. Phase 7 hero-page work replaces this with a unified canvas-app page.
2. **MARK stage absent** — no lineage table exists; MARK shows up as Power Automate audit trail in Phase 4. Adding an empty MARK node now would look broken.
3. **Operations Dashboard subarea is a placeholder** — recommend skipping until Phase 6 builds the dashboard. An empty dashboard looks worse than a missing nav entry.

## Reference artifact: `dataverse/sitemap/aurum_steward_workbench_sitemap.xml`

Technically-valid SiteMap XML generated alongside this walkthrough. NOT directly importable in modern maker UI (no standalone-XML import path exists), but usable in the classic site map designer's XML view (modern designer → ⋯ → Switch to classic → Sitemap → ⋯ → XML view → paste). Kept as a structured reference + future-import-path artifact (when we generate solution `.zip` packages in Phase 5+).
